zh.Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Whalesborough於大約1311年出生在英國可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir William de Whalesburgh26歲，母親Joan Carminow42歲。她於1337年與Henry de Wilington結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年3月20日在英國戴文享年53歲。

zh-hans.Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England: 英国格盧斯特斯爾桑德爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Whalesborough于大约1311年出生在英国可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir William de Whalesburgh26岁，母亲Joan Carminow42岁。她于1337年与Henry de Wilington结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年3月20日在英国戴文享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Whalesborough was born about 1311, in Cornwall, England, her father, Sir William de Whalesburgh, was 26 and her mother, Joan Carminow, was 42. She married Henry de Wilington in 1337. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 March 1363, in Devon, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Whalesborough est née environ 1311, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Whalesburgh, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Joan Carminow, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Henry de Wilington en 1337. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1363, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Whalesborough um 1311 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Whalesburgh 26 und ihre Mutter Joan Carminow 42. Sie hat 1337 Henry de Wilington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1363 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Whalesborough è nata il circa 1311 nel Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir William de Whalesburgh, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Joan Carminow, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Henry de Wilington nel 1337. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1363, nel Devon, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.Sandhurst, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアサンドハルスト

ja.Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワル
ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Whalesboroughが約1311年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir William de Whalesburghは26歳，母Joan Carminowは42歳であった。1337年にHenry de Wilingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年3月20日にイギリスデボンで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Whalesborough(이)가 대략 1311년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Whalesburgh(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Carminow(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1337년 Henry de Wilington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 3월 20일 영국 데폰에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Whalesborough nasceu aproximadamente 1311, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Whalesburgh, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Joan Carminow, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry de Wilington em 1337. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1363, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Whalesborough родилась около 1311 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Whalesburgh было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Carminow, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry de Wilington в 1337 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 марта 1363 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Whalesborough nació aproximadamente 1311, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Whalesburgh, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Joan Carminow, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Henry de Wilington en 1337. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1363, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
